name: ADS
description: Adaptive Decision System — meta-orquestrador de decisões automatizadas. Risk Engine + Confidence Engine + Policy Engine + Decision Router + Learning Loop.

lgpd_compliance.activity_log_note: ADS usa DB::table query-builder (sem Eloquent Models). Audit append-only fica em sale_stage_history (FSM) + mcp_dual_brain_decisions (resolved_by/resolved_at). LogsActivity Spatie será adicionado quando ADS migrar pra Eloquent.
